name: Beer Batter Fried Veggies 'n' Things
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope Environ Golden Onion Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix until well blended.
2. Use the mixture to coat vegetables or other items such as chilled spears of mozzarella cheese.
3. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 350°F (175°C).
4. Fry coated vegetables or cheese, turning occasionally, until golden brown.
